description_long: This is a modern sectional sofa with a left-facing chaise and a right-angled main seating area, upholstered in a solid, light-colored fabric. The sofa features six large, loose back cushions and two seat cushions, all of which appear plush and generously filled for comfort. The armrests are straight, broad, and padded, matching the height of the backrest for a boxy, contemporary silhouette. The legs are short, block-style, and slightly recessed, providing stable support while remaining visually unobtrusive. The upholstery is smooth and uniform, with no visible patterns or decorative stitching, giving the sofa a clean and minimalist appearance. This piece is well-suited for urban environments such as apartment lobbies, modern living rooms, or communal lounge areas.
description: A modern sectional sofa with a left-facing chaise, six loose back cushions, and smooth, light-colored upholstery. It features straight padded armrests and short, block-style legs for a clean, contemporary look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full sectional layout, six back cushions, two seat cushions, and both armrests.
description_view_1: Side view from the left, highlighting the chaise extension and the thickness of the armrest and cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, smooth back and the alignment of the back cushions.
description_view_3: Side view from the right, showing the main seating area and the right armrest profile.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Six large, loose back cushions arranged in a single row, two wide seat cushions, all uniform in size and shape, with a sectional layout including a chaise.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, broad, and padded armrests at both ends, matching the height of the backrest, with a boxy, contemporary profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Short, block-style legs, slightly recessed at the corners, likely made of wood or metal, with a simple, unobtrusive design.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest with six loose, uniform cushions forming a continuous, plush support surface.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid, smooth fabric with no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching; the upholstery appears matte and uniform.
